pairs.py:
def count_leaves(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that have no children."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) == 0: acc += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return acc

def sum_squares(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the squares of reachable node values."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v * v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def max_under_cap(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the largest reachable value strictly below cap, or -1 if none."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; cap = spec["cap"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = -1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v < cap and v > best: best = v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

def sorted_reachable_vals(spec: dict) -> list:
    """Gather the values of all nodes reachable from start, sorted ascending."""
    adj = spec["adj"]
    vals = spec["vals"]
    seen = set()
    stack = [spec["start"]]
    bag = []
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(n)
        bag.append(vals[n])
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return sorted(bag)

def arms_balanced(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """True when every direct child of base heads a subtree of the same node count."""
    kids = spec["kids"]
    sizes = []
    for ch in kids.get(spec["base"], []):
        n = 0
        stack = [ch]
        while stack:
            cur = stack.pop()
            n += 1
            stack.extend(kids.get(cur, []))
        sizes.append(n)
    return len(set(sizes)) <= 1

def guestbook_report(spec: dict) -> str:
    """One-line dashboard summary of the guestbook."""
    days = spec["days"]
    total = 0
    best_d = "none"
    best_n = -1
    for day in sorted(days, key=lambda x: x["date"]):
        n = len(day["visitors"])
        total += n
        if n > best_n:
            best_d = day["date"]
            best_n = n
    return "days=" + str(len(days)) + " visitors=" + str(total) + " busiest=" + best_d
